_notes: Each city points at its own Webflow site (one site per city).
The sync iterates over cities[] and writes one folder per slug under data/.
Set `active: false` to keep a city in the config but skip its sync (useful for cities that haven't launched yet but you want pre-defined).
Add new cities by appending to the array — no code changes needed.
If different cities live in different Webflow workspaces, add a `webflowApiTokenEnvVar` field per city pointing at a different env var name.
